svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="四层规范:从软到硬" id="specslayers"> <mxGraphModel dx="-444" dy="-138" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="四层规范:越往下越不可绕过" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="340" x="320" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="① 规则文件(.cursor/rules)
按文件类型触发 · alwaysApply / globs
硬度:提示(理论上可忽略)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="620" x="180" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#bfdbfe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="② 技能库(.agents/skills)
90+ 按需加载 · 教方法不教约束
硬度:按需参考(不调用不生效)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="540" x="220" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#93c5fd;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="③ 启动清单(CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md)
开机强制过一遍 · 确认知道规矩
硬度:强制加载(开机即生效)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="460" x="260" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0f766e;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="④ 运行时 hook(.git/hooks)
物理拦截 · 提交动作本身被拦
硬度:不可绕过(想绕也绕不过)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="380" x="300" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="soft" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="软 ← 提示 / 参考" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hard" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=11;" value="硬 → 物理拦截" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="40" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="规范所有权:从「靠人自觉」转移到「靠系统执行」 · 制定和执行分离" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="540" x="220" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
